description: Group MOVE with COMP-3 child: engine concatenates display values, not raw bytes
notes: IBM: group MOVE copies raw bytes including COMP-3 packed representation (3 bytes for PIC 9(4)). Aletheia: concatenates display values — WS-NAME='ABC' + WS-AMT.to_display()='0123' truncated. Result='ABC123' (6 chars). GAP: COMP-3 display length differs from packed byte length.
